meaning: adj.医学的,药的,有益的,有帮助的
examples: He claims he keeps a bottle of brandy only for medicinal purposes.
He also had an invincible faith in the medicinal virtues of garlic.
Doctors in the Netherlands were allowed to start prescribing medicinal cannabis to patients in 2003.
Many of the project leaders in offshore CROs are Big Pharma trained medicinal chemists.
